# v1.2.5

Another set of small UI stuff. Pretty happy with how things are looking in the UI, gonna start working on the inventory scanner next.

## New stuff

- Fetched upgrades are now locked (you'll need to re-fetch to actually see that) by default
- Simple arithmetic input like 123\*75 + 345\*67 are now supported

## Fixes & improvements

- Optimizer runs involving advanced honing should now be significantly faster after the first run.
- Sidereal weapons are now treated as +25 instead of +10
- Question mark hover tooltips no longer disappear on every optimizer update
- Artisan energy is no longer stored as a rounded number
